violations.text: Jalapeno Cream Cheese was observed held beyond 7 days from the marked date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation and held for no longer than 7 days unless frozen. Cream cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The screen door to the outside is not tight-fitting (screen detached/gap at base). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Owner stated door is due for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

The sugar scoop was stored on an unclean surface (tabletop next to sugar) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoop was brought to the dish area for proper washing and sanitizing prior to next use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Ceiling tiles around the ceiling mounted air conditioning unit were observed to be stained and sagging. Per the Owner, tiles are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

At the time of inspection, deli meats were observed stored in the 2 Door Freezer and 2 Door Refrigerator in reduced oxygen packaging. A FOOD ESTABLISHMENT shall obtain a VARIANCE from the REGULATORY AUTHORITY packaging TIME/TEMPERATURE CONTROL FOR SAFETY FOOD using a REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGING method. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection (see Disposal). Vacuum sealer was taken out of service and removed at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, will use freezer bags moving forward. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Ice Machine - 2 Door Freezer (Ice Build-up) Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (currently equipped with an Air Break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024

The floor/wall in the back prep area behind and under the 3 Bay Sink has an accumulation of soil residue/debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2024
